faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

placements.overview:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions is a partnership institute, established in 2009 in Mohali, Punjab. Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 17 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 11 specialisations such as Chemistry, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Finance. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc. and BBA in Full Time mode. Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 93,100 to 3,17,800. Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions has an annual seat intake of 450 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, Hospitality & Travel and Science. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

A hallmark of this institute is an all-inclusive learning experience to its students through extracurricular activities as well as resources such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 93,100 to 3,17,800. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BBA. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM and M.Sc.

Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions has course specializations in Human Resources, Finance, Sales & Marketing, Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics, Medical Laboratory Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with teachers, owner of the college, who discriminates against Kashmiris.

review_content.Placements: During our whole course of my degree of 3 years, no company visits our college to provide jobs to any student, and no package was offered in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel facility. The medical facilities were not available in this college. Sports facility was not provided for the students to enjoy the games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were having rude behavior with students especially during exam time, I would also discuss with teachers that teachers were average, and exams were difficult, but sometimes easy overall it was average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of placements.

review_content.Placements: My senior says that about four students out of 120 students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit our college for placements. A top role offered in our college is a site engineer. Our college does not provide an internship for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The college is located in the outskirts of the main city. The buildings are not much old and are in good condition. The campus is lush green, and it looks good. Our college provides facilities like a basketball court, cricket ground, table tennis court, badminton court, etc. Every facility is available in our college. Our college provides excellent hostel facility with well-furnished rooms separately for both boys and girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am well satisfied with my college and the faculty they provide.

review_content.Placements: Placements offered in our course are best as about 75% of the students get placed every year from our course. I have seen that almost all our seniors got placed in highly reputed companies. The highest salary package offered is up to 10 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered is up to 6 LPA. Every student gets an internship Certificate in a reputed company, but None of the students did it and got trained except me.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college wi-fi facility is available. All labs are fully equipped with the instrument. The college infrastructure is very good there is a sports facility is available like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball we etc. The hostel is available but there rating is average. Mess facility is a good quality of food is good.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: The university offers a variety of programmes at different levels. However, some of the popular programmes of the university are BTech in Computer Science, Civil, Electrical, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and MBA. The BTech programme at the university is offered in these five branches. Selecting any branch offers skills and knowledge to enter and pursue a career in relevant fields. Another popular programme of the university at the master's level is the MBA. The programme offers the fundamental knowledge and specialized skills of expertise in finance, marketing, operations, human resources, or strategy. This two-year programme helps students to become good leaders, strategists, and experts in the industry. Students can choose a specialisation for the MBA programme out of four options available at the university which include Finance, Human Resources, IT, and Marketing.

placements.overview: FS University is a renowned university successfully operating for two decades. The university has been awarded multiple times by different bodies for its outstanding performance. It received the Excellence in Teaching Award as Best Impactful University of the Year 2022. It also received an award of Fastest Growing University in Uttar Pradesh by Deputy CM of UP.

faqs.answer: A:    As a BSc Agriculture graduate, you can go for various bank job opportunities. Some popular job profiles include:Specialist officer (Agricultural Field Officer)Junior Agricultural AssociateField OfficerProbationary OfficerRural Development OfficerAgricultural Officer

faqs.answer: A:    FS University has been successfully running for the last two decades. The university understands and caters to the problems and requirements of the students. There is a dedicated placement cell in the university. They offer special skills and training to the students by organising various activities. The cell also helps students by helping them identify their choice of career.
faqs.question: Does FS University offer any placements to the students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: FS University is a university that’s successfully operating and offering qualifications to the students of the region. The university offers 60+ programmes which include Diploma, Polytechnic, Bachelors, Masters, and Doctoral programmes. Students can choose programmes from different streams like Nursing, Pharmacy, education, Ayurveda, and many more. Programmes offered are of different duration ranging from one year to 66 months programmes. The university is focused on strengthening its industrial relations. This will further help in grooming students to become industry professionals by offering them an industry-driven curriculum, training, and insight into modern market trends and challenges. Candidates can visit the official site for detailed info regarding these programmes. Check the below section for more details of the programmes offered at FS University:

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

reviews_list.review_title: The university of Firozabad is located near the city.

review_content.Placements: FS University is very good university. Approximately 1,000 students enrolled in B.Sc. from Maths. Everyone is good in their studies, and they are placed in different companies on the post of assistant manager and other posts in various companies. Some of them are starting their start-up.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of hostel is very good and new bulidings are under construction. The whole campus is covered with high-speed Wi-Fi. We have a playground, auditorium, and mess facilities. There is a big library where you can easily access books and magazines.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of placements. Good infrastructure, low fees, and we will get only degrees here

review_content.Placements: I think that no one from our college has ever secured a placement anywhere through the B.Com course. Even for M.Com, there is a very low placement, around 1-2%. That's why I am giving only one star because of placement. I don't know the main reason behind this but I think it might be due to its location.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has very good infrastructure, like Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, a good environment, a green campus, good classrooms, etc. In the hostel, I like very much that is sports and games like cricket. There are good medical facilities. Canteen has limited things and the mess is above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: FUS University Shikohabad, Uttar Pradesh: This is the Best Faculty of Education, Campus, Gym.

review_content.Placements: 70 percent of people in our college got placement and along with this 60 percent people also got employment. The teachers in our college had the best behavior. Many people from our city have made their future bright to a great extent with FUS University and it is considered the best university in our local area.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi and internet, a good computer system, and a gym facility are also available in our university. There is also a sports ground for sports. With this, 60% of people also got employment, and the teachers in our college had the best behavior. Many people from our city have made their future bright to a great extent with FUS University, and it is considered the best university in our local area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College placement support, but not for all courses students. Classroom, library, and mess are good.

content.Placements: 0% placement in my course. Because this year placement company hired technical courses students. For an internship, a company comes to hire some students. This college provided best courses such as graduation, post-graduation, medical courses, nursing courses, law courses, and technical courses. Placement is good for technical students. I wish placement supported all the course students.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very nice, and the water quality is good. No available Wi-Fi. Classroom and library are very beautiful and quiet. Hostel and mess are all good. Medical support is very good. Sports and game movements are good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Finally, the college is completely good.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is approximately 12%. The highest salary is Rs. 20,000, the lowest is Rs. 16,000, and the average is Rs. 18,000. No recruiting companies visit here but the study is very good and the environment is very good for students. So finally my college is very good.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for course are very good. The quality of Wi-Fi and other facilities are available in our college. Labs are available. Library and facility of hostel are available. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_text: In my college, you see many big classrooms, labs, a library, and a hall. There are well-equipped Chemistry, Physics, and practical labs, which are good compared to other colleges. There are many courses and departments for students. B.Sc. students have their own department, BA students have theirs, and MSc students have theirs as well. In every department, there is WiFi with routers for students to use free data on phones and laptops for their studies. The quality of the mess and canteen is aver...

reviews.review_heading: I chose the wrong college, but you don't have to. Always choose an older college.

I did not stay in a hostel, but my hostel friends said that the hostel was pretty good and well-maintained, though the food was average.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers a supportive environment for both academic and personal growth.
reviews.review_text: There were four buildings in the college, utilized for curricular, co-curricular, and extra-curricular activities. They were well-maintained, electrified and supplied with water facilities. The institution had spacious, well-ventilated and adequately furnished classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average because it is newly opened, but it is improving day by day.
reviews.review_text: The worst part was that the Wi-Fi did not work properly. Labs, classrooms, and the library were well-maintained. Hostel facilities were not very helpful for us. The canteen was neat and clean, and the taste of the food was average. There were many playgrounds on the campus for sports like volleyball, cricket, and badminton.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Thangavelu Engineering College as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Thangavelu Engineering College is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Thangavelu Engineering College has a rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 3.6 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Thangavelu Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good for all, and the lab facilities are also good.

content.Placements: The students' placement percentage ranges from 72%. The 80% students got internships from companies like TCS, etc. There are top recruiting companies, they are Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Amazon, HCL, Dell, Infosys, Tata Business Support Service Limited, Ford, Royal Enfield, etc. The packages differ based on selected courses.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, the college has more space, and each class environment is friendly. There are smart classes available. The auditorium is big with air conditioning, and they conduct many special events. They conduct sports meets, an Annual meet, and the canteen is good with good food. But the hostel is not bad. The labs are a conditioned and well-maintained library with 15,000 books and articles. There is no Wi-Fi available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Thangavelu Engineering College is a good college with good infrastructure and facilities

content.Placements: Thangavelu Engineering College is one of the best placement colleges in Chennai. This college brought more reputed organizations like Accenture, Teach Mahendra, Zoho, IBM, TCS, and Infosys for these college campus interviews. That company offered 4-15 lacs per annum salary packages. 90% of students placed in 2021 passed out batch.
content.Infrastructure: Thangavelu Engineering College has more spacious classrooms and Hi Teach laboratories here at this college. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities on the college campus. A good library is also available in this college. This college sports grounds facilities were excellent. Indoor sports grounds facilities are also here at this college. This college hostel foods taste is very good. Emergency medical facilities are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, facilities, teaching, and placements.

content.Placements: Our branch is EEE, the average salary package will be 3.5 LPA, and the staff will be very friendly with students. It has good placements and top recruiting companies are hiring. A good percentage of students get placement. For internships, after 3rd year we can choose and get the certificate.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the classrooms are good. In library facilities are good, and sports are provided every week once. The mess and canteen are very good. The facilities are good. Labs are good and they explain every topic. I enjoyed studying as a student in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and infrastructure. Facilities can be improved.

content.Placements: The placement drive take place in the final year. The companies coming to college are not top ones and the offers are also not that great. Job vacancies were more but the companies preferred skilled students. The college should focus on improving students skill and not on their marks.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good but the maintenance is not up to the mark. there is a big ground but again it was not maintained well. The college campus needs to be cleaned properly.
content.Faculty: The college faculty is friendly with students. The course curriculum is also up to the mark and useful for students. Exams are conducted from time to time properly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good placements, good teachers, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: More than 60% of students were selected for internships. Now top roles are offered to AI. As a fresher, you get jobs with a salary package of 3 LPA to 4 LPA. More than 50 members in our course were placed in campus selection. It will depend on the performance of students.
content.Infrastructure: It has good facilities and good quality of infrastructure. All rooms have power and are available 24 hours a day. They provide good maintenance in the canteen. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained. Sports and games are conducted for 1 hour every week.

hostel_campus.college_name: Thangavelu Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for all, and the lab facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, the college has more space, and each class environment is friendly. There are smart classes available. The auditorium is big with air conditioning, and they conduct many special events. They conduct sports meets, an Annual meet, and the canteen is good with good food. But the hostel is not bad. The labs are a conditioned and well-maintained library with 15,000 books and articles. There is no Wi-Fi available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Thangavelu Engineering College is a good college with good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text: Thangavelu Engineering College has more spacious classrooms and Hi Teach laboratories here at this college. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities on the college campus. A good library is also available in this college. This college sports grounds facilities were excellent. Indoor sports grounds facilities are also here at this college. This college hostel foods taste is very good. Emergency medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, facilities, teaching, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the classrooms are good. In library facilities are good, and sports are provided every week once. The mess and canteen are very good. The facilities are good. Labs are good and they explain every topic. I enjoyed studying as a student in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and infrastructure. Facilities can be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but the maintenance is not up to the mark. there is a big ground but again it was not maintained well. The college campus needs to be cleaned properly.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, good teachers, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has good facilities and good quality of infrastructure. All rooms have power and are available 24 hours a day. They provide good maintenance in the canteen. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained. Sports and games are conducted for 1 hour every week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a ragging-free campus, and you can be friendly to your seniors.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and Wi-Fi. There are labs for physics, chemistry, electronics, mechanics, civil, etc. Everylab has a good infrastructure and it is fully maintained. There is 24x7 electricity in the hostel. There are some exceptions too, due to some emergencies. Unlike other colleges, here you can have electrical appliances of approximately 1500W. The mess food is good enough to eat.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college within Chennai city.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a neat infrastructure with well-planted trees, well-equipped classrooms, laboratories, playgrounds, separate seminar hall, AV room, canteen, and separate hostels for boys and girls, etc. Drinking water and restrooms were kept on every floor, but the maintenance was a little poor. Overall the infrastructure was above average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institute to opt for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled and has highly specialised laboratories for all departments. Our college provides support to every sport and cultural events. It also has a good canteen facility and library. There is a good medical facility for students, and also more than 3 hospitals are available nearby our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and should improve.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-equipped laboratory and playground. Comparing to the restroom and drinking water all are good. Medical facilities are also available in the college. The quality of the food is also good but the canteen size and products kept there are small while comparing to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are available here in a good manner.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure with neat and clean surrounding. The playground is huge and used for various sports activities. The campus is regularly cleaned. The infrastructure is provided with all basic facilities. All buildings are provided with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The only bad thing about the college is placements.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities in our college are okay, and the classrooms are not bad. Canteens are not good, and it's not fully Wi-Fi enabled campus. The hostel is average. Food served is poor. The college is located in OMR, Chennai. Bus facilities are okay, but buses are not in good condition. The library and computer lab are available here but not in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Waste of money and time because there is no placement.
reviews.review_text: Simple but not worthy one compared to the fee they are charging. The washrooms and drinking water areas will be very poor and unhygienic. Our college is not a Wi-Fi enabled campus so please don't agree if they say it is Wi-Fi enabled. There is no proper coaching for the students who come under sports quota and not even a kit room we have, very poor regarding sports. Hostel food is the worst thing to ever taste in your life other than the hostel rooms will be very comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Except for placements, everything is good in this college.
reviews.review_text: Fortunately, there are many trees in our college, which is very good to hear and a lot of space to sit and eat. More spaces are also available for games and sports. I will rate 3.5 stars for the college infrastructure. The only disadvantage is walking the distance between college and bus stop is a bit longer. No Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Classrooms are good with 4-5 fans, blackboard, benches and windows. Canteen is available for both hostlers and day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of those mentioned problems.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was very bad compared to other colleges. Not even an auditorium was in a good manner. Classrooms are okay, but not up to the mark. The drinking water filter repairs often. Labs are not air-conditioned. They will only switch-on during university practicals for externals. Most of the computers don't work. Sports are not well-encouraged in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Thangavelu Engineering College is the place for fun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not bad. We had proper lab facilities. Roads connecting the college was the major problem during rainy days. There are no facilities for sports as most of the cricket ground is occupied by parking college buses. We have a volleyball court.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, CSI Institute of Technology has an impressive review rating of 3.69 by 9 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at CSI Institute of Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CSI Institute of Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the CSI Institute of Technology offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for CSI Institute of Technology courses range between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of CSI Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: The college has tremendous placements, and all the students were placed in top companies. Companies like TCS, HCL, Apple and Google visited the campus. Students were engaged in attending the interviews, and it is very useful for employment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is up to the mark and beyond expectations. All the classrooms and labs were well-maintained, and students feel pleasure being on the campus. It has a great infrastructure. I got to learn many things which are good for my career.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Get a degree without hassle.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements at all. If it occurs, it will be merely in the average of about 10,000-15,000 per month salary. Companies like small BPO which are in the nearby locations have visited the campus. No stipends are provided here, so don't expect.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, especially the hostel facilities are good. The food will be in satisfying range. The playground is ample to work out. Labs are provided with all kinds of experimental equipment. The only negative point is no talented staff, only very few are up to the mark.

individual_reviews.title: I am not much satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students are placed this time. The highest salary package offered was 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are good but need more infrastructure. The library is well maintained. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good placements in the best companies.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students from our course got placed. I got placed in CTS company with a salary package of 4 LPA. The management provides good placements. The college provides much exposure for students.
content.Infrastructure: It is one of the few colleges in the university which has upgraded its classrooms to facilitate teaching through modern tools and techniques. The college provides air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, library, a state-of-the-art seminar room and a fully equipped auditorium with a seating capacity of about 750 students. The infrastructure of our college is very friendly. We can roam here and there on the campus. Lab facilities are good. The hostel provides home feelings. The college provides 24x7 lab facility where we can expose ourself.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of CSI Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: The college has tremendous placements, and all the students were placed in top companies. Companies like TCS, HCL, Apple and Google visited the campus. Students were engaged in attending the interviews, and it is very useful for employment.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is up to the mark and beyond expectations. All the classrooms and labs were well-maintained, and students feel pleasure being on the campus. It has a great infrastructure. I got to learn many things which are good for my career.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Get a degree without hassle.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all. If it occurs, it will be merely in the average of about 10,000-15,000 per month salary. Companies like small BPO which are in the nearby locations have visited the campus. No stipends are provided here, so don't expect.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, especially the hostel facilities are good. The food will be in satisfying range. The playground is ample to work out. Labs are provided with all kinds of experimental equipment. The only negative point is no talented staff, only very few are up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Good place to start your career dream.

content.Placements: The college is running good placement cell. Mr Nackson is very a good person; he used to encourage all the students. In my batch, within three to four months, we got four companies for the campus recruitment. The departmental staff also used to encourage all the students. The communication skills of the students can be improved by the communication classes conducted every week. It is a nice college to study.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a qualified teaching staff, experienced lab assistants, equipped library and good transportation. The college conducts religious movement, sports activities and campus recruitment. They provide good hostel facilities for both the boys as well as the girls. Full security is available for female students. The campus has a good environment.

review_summary.college_name: AIEMD - Aryabhatta Institute of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: College life was awesome, but placements were average.

content.Placements: Placements of our college were average. They brought companies related to their own stream of students. Since I was a CSE student, I know more about our stream only. The average salary package offered in our stream is around 4-5 LPA. Few of the top recruiting companies are Persistent, TCS, L&T, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good as it has a badminton court, canteen, girls hostel inside the campus, basketball court, etc. Each department has its own labs and faculty members room. The library has numerous books. Students can issue books from the library, and at the end of the semester, students need to return the books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I had an awesome experience and gained knowledge in this college.

content.Placements: Almost 4,000 students got placed in the ECE department from our college until 2017. The highest salary package offered was 18 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA and the average salary package offered was 8 to 12 LPA. Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Infosys, etc., are the main recruiting companies of our college. The top role offered to the students is a junior engineering graduate. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 14 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 6 LPA and the average salary package offered was 7 to 8 LPA. Almost 90% of the students got an internship opportunity from various company like Infosys, Wipro, Ericsson, Huawei, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college is good only for studies.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were not much good. Only 20% of the students were placed. The highest package offered was 2.25 LPA, and the lowest package was 1.25 LPA. Roles offered for placed students were blue collar ones. There was no internship programme for Diploma students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library and sports facilities were available. Wi-Fi and medical facilities were not available. Quality of classrooms and labs was good, but the equipment of labs was very old. Quality of food in the canteen was good. Hostel rooms were good but not much clean.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is very good for study but if you talk about the placements that is very low.

content.Placements: If you talk about placement than Nothing much placements was in my college. I have seen the seniors only 2 percent placed. The highest package was 2 lac and the lowest package was 1.2 lac only. There are only 1 or 2 companies visits ib my college. If you talk about the role offered to the student was blue collar labour. It's true.
content.Infrastructure: The labs, classrooms, library are very good in the college but there is no medical facilities there. The quality of classrooms and lab is very nice and the library also. Food facility of canteen is good. Hostel facilities of college is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Eco friendly college, have good infrastructure and facilities. Thinking for the good of students.

content.Placements: There were very good placements at one time. Now a days as per the engineering market, it has decreased. Mainly IT companies come to the campus, Like TCS, CTS, Wipro, etc. Training and placement officer manages the placement cell. Pass-out students also help current students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, Lab rooms, Library are sufficient as per norms. Wi-fi systems also installed on the campus, but it not fully covered and data speed is also not good. The quality of labs and classrooms are good, but not maintenance. There is canteen in the college campus, the quality of food is good, but not delicious. The boys hostel rooms are good, but not the campus area, two girls hostels are in the campus area. Overall good in condition.

reviews.review_heading: I had an awesome experience and gained knowledge in this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, sufficient classrooms, library, canteen, playground, boys and girls hostels all are available inside the campus. A medical facility, sports ground and indoor games like carrom board, chess and table tennis are also available in the hostel. Food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good only for studies.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is very good for study but if you talk about the placements that is very low.

reviews.review_heading: Eco friendly college, have good infrastructure and facilities. Thinking for the good of students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, Lab rooms, Library are sufficient as per norms. Wi-fi systems also installed on the campus, but it not fully covered and data speed is also not good. The quality of labs and classrooms are good, but not maintenance. There is canteen in the college campus, the quality of food is good, but not delicious. The boys hostel rooms are good, but not the campus area, two girls hostels are in the campus area. Overall good in condition.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are very good. Placements are not good in 2017. The infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not very good. The infrastructure resembles our home. The main gate of the college is good, but the classrooms are not much cleaned, and they are not properly designed. All the classrooms look similar, and they are not very much good. Even the condition of the seminar room is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aryabhatta Institute of Engineering and Management, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not good, and it has an under construction building. The classrooms are not so good. The canteen food is very bad. The library is decent. No Wi-Fi facility is available. The labs are not up to date, and no electrical or computer lab is perfect.

reviews.review_heading: The students must be saved from this college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is not good, but we have the facilities like libraries, labs, etc., in our college. We have a Wi-Fi facility in hostels for both boys and girls. The food in the canteen is also good. We have no big ground, but we have a volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is available here, and all modern laboratories are available here. Our college has eco-friendly classrooms and a modern and updated library. Medical facilities are available here, and every student attends sessional sports. Everyone here cooperates with us, and we respect our superiors. Hostel facilities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Everything Is good except the placements. Still u can get to tech mahendra or some similar company.

Food quality is good u can get multi cuisine food in the canteen, hostel rooms are spacious with neat and clean environment I didn't faced any issue in fact I enjoyed there a lot.

An Airforce camp is present nearby the college. It will be annoying, at the time of flight crossings. The ground of the college is also very much far from the main campus.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Aryabhatta Institute of Engineering and Management, Durgapur.

The labs were of decent quality. The food in the hostel is generally of good quality. The hostel rooms are also of decent quality, but they have only two types of rooms, one was three-sharing and others were of four-sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college, simply don't study here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available sometimes. The college is a master in conducting government and private exams as if it is not a college but only an exam centre. It is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfaction is what you get coming in this college. The faculty are too bad to talk about it.

It has indoor and outdoor sports facilities. Hostel rooms are satisfactory. The classrooms are not cleaned properly. It has old, rusty benches and desks.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not suitable for course like B.Tech. Neither infrastructure nor facility is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not up to the mark. There is the Wi-Fi facility on the campus. The labs are good, and the classrooms are average. The library does not have the adequate amount of books. There are no medical facilities. The sports and games activities are negligible. The old fashionable labs and classrooms are available on the campus. The food in the canteen is good for non-vegetarian, but not for the vegetarian. The hostel and rooms are congested. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with my whole college life.

content.Placements: When I was in my 3rd year, one company came for placement they gave the highest package of 3 LPA in the marketing field except for the core field. Now I have completed my 8th semester exam and there is no call for placement from the college. And I would like to join the core field as my profession.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average according to fees but there are no students for making college life memorable. In my batch, there are only 13 students and only 5-6 students came to college. There are no lab practicals, due to which students have any practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good with faculty members and the best placements.

content.Placements: Around 200 students got placed on-campus recently. The highest salary package offered is 28 LPA and the average salary package offered is 6 LPA. More than 10 companies came to hire students recently. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Croma, HCL, etc. Our college offers 6-month internships for CSE and EE branches mostly.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has a very wide infrastructure and the best facilities. Wi-Fi is available in labs, classrooms, and the library. There are 4 messes. Food quality is excellent in the canteen. Medical facilities are available. The sports ground is available to play games.

content.Faculty: Our teachers were very good, and their teaching skills were the best. All departments were active. HODs were good, and I like them being responsible. They always give solutions to our problems.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best civil engineering college in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was recently closed. Wi-Fi facilities are available on both campus and hostel. Girls and boys have separate hostels, adn there is a canteen. Medical facilities are available about 850m away from college, i.e., Mahatma Gandhi hospital. Food quality is average. Sports facilities like cricket and volleyball are conducted at various festivals. Food facilities in mess are available for both hostelers and non-hostelers. Fast food, breakfast, cold drinks, chain, coffee, etc., are available i...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Yagyavalkya Institute of Technology's Infrastructure is one of the attractive infrastructures among other colleges in Jaipur. It has Digital classrooms, Library, and well-equipped labs. Safety of girls in it's hostel is worth praised. Quality of food in mess and canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2016 just because of our new TPO.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good as all the departments have separate blocks. The classrooms are modern, digitalised and are big with adequate light. There is a big ground for tournaments. Labs are well-arranged and equipped with outdated technology.

reviews.review_heading: YIT College, Jaipur, and it is approved by AICTE.
reviews.review_text: This college has well-equipped labs and classrooms. There is a big and awesome building, which is painted in green colour. Sports ground is there with green grass, and it is big. The basketball ground is also available. Big canteen is also available. The computer labs are too big. The college has enough facilities for the students. This college has better infrastructure when compared to many other colleges in Jaipur.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with satisfaction.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, video conference, library, medical games, etc. Our college provides and arranges live demonstration so that students can learn and have theoretically and practical experience of the things.

reviews.review_heading: Nothing good about our college, we just did our degrees just like other bachelor degrees.
reviews.review_text: We don't have Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Labs are there only for the namesake as nobody is available in them, and the classrooms are like the ones in schools. There is no library and also medical facilities. Sports events are organized only during annual functions, and that's all I can tell. There is no place in the college where we can sit and hang out during breaks.

reviews.review_heading: Attractive infrastructure, but low placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very awesome in this college, and you are going to get very fresh environment under this college. The college campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the college has a big central lawn in front of main building. The classrooms are very good in seating arrangements and aesthetics. Sadly there is no medical facility available in the college. Every sport (Indoor & Outdoor) is available in college. The labs are very good, all equipment is good and working. Canteen in this college is small...

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and placement.
reviews.review_text: Good facility of classrooms and labs. The hostel facility is excellent. Sports and games are organising in sports week. Simple, fast food available in the canteen. The hostel mess provides a good food. Biggest library in the college. All types of books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the hostel facilities, and the contract was given to mess. According to me, this hostel offers great amenities than any other college hostel, for the students who were living in it. There is a good infrastructure built by the college. The mess offers healthy food, but the quality of food was average somehow.

reviews.review_heading: Yagvalkya Institute of Technology is the best college and has the good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Yagvalkya Institute of Technology, Sitapura, Jaipur is the best engineering college for the electrical, civil, and mechanical branch. The campus has all the facilities like Wi-Fi,  AC labs, classrooms, and library.

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Holycross Engineering College admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Holycross Engineering College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Holycross Engineering College offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for Holycross Engineering College courses range between INR 50,000 to 2,61,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Holycross Engineering College is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Holycross Engineering College are Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Biochemical Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Holycross Engineering College?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: On a whole, our college is excellent in studies but there are a lot of rules and regulations.

review_content.Placements: Placements for our batch were a little bit less when compared to our senior batch. The highest salary package offered last year is around 3.50 lacs per annum and the lowest was around 1.50 lacs per annum. Our batch had low placements because some of the students who got placed from our senior batch didn't take up the jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark. Because our college campus is small when compared to other colleges, but it's not a matter because student intake in our college is less. On the whole, the infrastructure is good, and the lab facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Worth of completing the degree without arrears.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, totally 245 students are placed in various MNC companies. In our department, 56 students are placed with adoptable salary packages. The placements are quite amazing, but core companies placements are low. Our college does not arrange internship training.
review_content.Infrastructure: A canteen is available, but the rate of snacks is high. Not more than 3 or 4 lab machines are working. The food in the hostel is not good. The bathroom toilets are good. Classrooms have a whiteboard. Hostel rooms are normal. RO water is used for overall college. Wi-Fi connection is not provided to students. Cell phones are strictly avoided. The library is good, but a minimum number of books are only available. Medical facilities are provided by the college. Computer labs are good but mechanical related labs are average. Most of the machines are under repair conditions. Play grounds are available but not for playing, and only for sports day use.

review_summary.college_name: Holycross Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Join our college to get placements.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed. HCl and Infosys were the top recruiting companies for our course. System manager, database developer, AI developer, etc., were the job roles offered in our course. The highest salary package offered was 9.40 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 4.05 LPA. About 50% of students got internships in BSNL, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, lab, electrical lab, computer lab, library, etc., were available in our college. There was a sports ground with a volleyball court, cricket, co-co and indoor games like chess, carrom board, etc. It had a clean canteen. The medical facilities were good in quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: On a whole, our college is excellent in studies but there are a lot of rules and regulations.

content.Placements: Placements for our batch were a little bit less when compared to our senior batch. The highest salary package offered last year is around 3.50 lacs per annum and the lowest was around 1.50 lacs per annum. Our batch had low placements because some of the students who got placed from our senior batch didn't take up the jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark. Because our college campus is small when compared to other colleges, but it's not a matter because student intake in our college is less. On the whole, the infrastructure is good, and the lab facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Worth of completing the degree without arrears.

content.Placements: In our batch, totally 245 students are placed in various MNC companies. In our department, 56 students are placed with adoptable salary packages. The placements are quite amazing, but core companies placements are low. Our college does not arrange internship training.
content.Infrastructure: A canteen is available, but the rate of snacks is high. Not more than 3 or 4 lab machines are working. The food in the hostel is not good. The bathroom toilets are good. Classrooms have a whiteboard. Hostel rooms are normal. RO water is used for overall college. Wi-Fi connection is not provided to students. Cell phones are strictly avoided. The library is good, but a minimum number of books are only available. Medical facilities are provided by the college. Computer labs are good but mechanical related labs are average. Most of the machines are under repair conditions. Play grounds are available but not for playing, and only for sports day use.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everyone can absolutely enjoy our college because our college is like heaven.

content.Placements: So many students get placed in our college, with a placement rate above 95%. Placement is very good, and teachers are very friendly, providing interview practice and helping students build a better future and financial stability. This college has the highest chance of getting students good positions in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: One of the best infrastructure development projects in our college. It is ongoing because the management wants to provide good facilities for the students to support their performance. All the infrastructure is amazing, with good roads for transportation and buses for comfortable travel.

faqs.answer:
A:    Pankaj Laddhad Institute of Technology and Management Studies, Buldana has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very poor. No companies visit our campus for placements. So, you can't expect any job after completing a specific course. During my tenure, only 2 to 3 small companies visited our campus to hire students with a salary package of 1-1.4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is better than the other colleges in Buldana, and its surrounding cities. The college has adequate classrooms, library, hostel, canteen and laboratories. The college also provides hostel facilities for boys with limited intake.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average and infrastructure is good but network issue is there. The lecturer is not good and did not complete a portion. There is no hostel and mess and no medical facilities are offered. They have sports and cultural activities.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Group of Institution(Faculty of Engineering, Pharmacy, MBA, MCA), Jabalpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good, but they should improve their teaching skills.

content.Placements: In Computer Science and Engineering, 50 to 60% of students were placed. The highest package went up to 80 LPA, offered by Atlassian, while the average package was nearly 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Atlassian, Infosys, Jio, TCS, etc. Around 30 to 40% of students took internships in various multinational companies. The top roles offered were web developer, app developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel facility in the college, but m outside the college there were many private hostels. The college infrastructure was good, and classrooms were neat, clean, and well-ventilated. All academic books were available in the library. Wi-Fi facility labs were also present, along with smart classrooms to guide and teach students in a digital way. There was a canteen inside the campus, which was quite good and maintained hygiene while cooking food. Various types of sports, as well as indoor and outdoor games, were played in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Jabalpur.

content.Placements: Almost 75-80% of students got placed in this course. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Mastech, Wipro, Jio, etc. The average salary package offered ranges between 3.5 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest salary package offered was 35 LPA. Around 60-70% of students got internships at Cisco, AICTE, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are available for all branches like civil, computer science, mechanical, etc. Canteen is very good. It also has a basketball court. Playground is available for sports like cricket.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: No.1 college in Jabalpur. No.1 college in mahakaushal.

content.Placements: 70 to 60 percent placement is offered. The highest package is 35 lakh. TCS, Infosys and a lot more companies came for placement. We are using a lot of artificial intelligence devices like Google Alexa siri than think about that what will be the role of artificial intelligence in future that's why I chose this course.
content.Infrastructure: College is very good. In college we have very good and clean classes, in my class we also have AC. Teachers are helpful, for all subjects we have best teachers in the college. There is canteen and sports is also available in the college like volleyball, cricket and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Jabalpur for engineering.

content.Placements: In this college (Shri ram group of institutions) most of the students were placed were from my stream of Computer Science engineering. The highest package from the college (Shri ram group of institutions) is 22 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. And according to the college (Shri ram group of institutions) average package of students is 6 Lacs per annum in computer Science engineering. There are too many companies visiting our college (Shri ram group of institutions). Some top companies are TCS, Wipro, Paytm, Reliance Jio etc. Most of the students got internships something about 70 to 80 %. Some students also got internships in multiple nation companies like Microsoft. In my course, the top offers are in the field of software Engineer and software development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college. It is the best college if you just want a degree.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. The highest and the lowest salary package is not offered to the students. Prism Cement company visit our college for placements. It does not provide internship opportunities. Overall, it does not provide placement opportunities in the civil engineering branch.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility as the college is in the city. There are so many PGs and hostels nearby. It provides facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students.
content.Faculty: Only HODs and some teachers are qualified in our college. Their teaching quality is average. They do not make students industry-ready. Semester exams are not so hard. The pass percentage is 95%. Students easily pass their semester exams as our college is affiliated with RGPV.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, but they should improve their teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: There was no hostel facility in the college, but m outside the college there were many private hostels. The college infrastructure was good, and  classrooms were neat, clean, and well-ventilated. All academic books were available in the library. Wi-Fi facility labs were also present, along with smart classrooms to guide and teach students in a digital way. There was a canteen inside the campus, which was quite good and maintained hygiene while cooking food. Various types of sports, as well as in...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are available for all branches like civil, computer science, mechanical, etc. Canteen is very good. It also has a basketball court. Playground is available for sports like cricket.

reviews.review_heading: No.1 college in Jabalpur. No.1 college in mahakaushal.
reviews.review_text:
College is very good. In college we have very good and clean classes, in my class we also have AC. 
Teachers are helpful, for all subjects we have best teachers in the college. There is canteen and sports is also available in the college like volleyball, cricket and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Jabalpur for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are not many facilities available the example Wi-Fi, interactive classes etc. The facilities of labs, Library are available for all the students. Also facilities of playground, canteen, NCC is available in our college (Shri ram group of institutions).

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. It is the best college if you just want a degree.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility as the college is in the city. There are so many PGs and hostels nearby. It provides facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure, academics and placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: SRIT College infrastructure is very good in Jabalpur city. All the facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library etc. This college has a canteen, medical and sports facilities. Many types of events are held every year. Both indoor and outdoor games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with necessary amenities.
reviews.review_text: In this kind of accommodation, students have access to TV room, aqua guard for hot, cold and normal drinking water and other leisure/sports activities within the hostel premises. Also includes the following facilities: 24x7 Wi-Fi connectivity provided in all hostels. 24x7 electricity and water supply in all the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Really it is an awesome college for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college has one of the best infrastructures in Madhya Pradesh. It has been one of the oldest institutions in Jabalpur region. Our institution doesn't provide hostel facility. However, there is a huge playground for sports, and a canteen is also available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I won't advise anyone to join my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great from the front view of college, but the construction never completes. They have decorated it from the front, but inside it's poor. Dirty and dusty lab equipment and most of them are out of order. During our full session, we kept protesting for the cleanliness of toilets and air condition, but they didn't do anything.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram Group of Institution, Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Shri Ram Engineering College is very good. There are proper regular classrooms and library. There is a separate department for sports, and many students got selected for the state-level competitions. Wi-Fi facility is available, and its speed is high. Primary medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, but not related to the best college.
reviews.review_text: College buildings, computers, and the campus are not satisfied by the fee. There are so many reasons the college may or may not be satisfied with the fees, like the college is under construction, and the computers are of bad quality and provide a bad experience. Wi-Fi and computers are of too old generation and working slow. College is good, but not better.

reviews.review_heading: This college is reasonable for middle-class families.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were better in this college. The infrastructure was good. Wi-Fi was also enabled. Laboratory was better. Classrooms were maintained properly. It also provided a decent library. Hostels were not available but we can stay in private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Our college achieved its ambition of being a world-class education provider.
reviews.review_text: Our college is really good, and I suggest it to every student. The canteen facility is average, and the quality of the food served is good in the mess. The library is the best.

reviews.review_heading: In Shri Ram Group, faculty members are very good, but the placements are average.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is average here, and the classrooms are also average. However, the library is very good, and the labs are also good. The hostel facility is not available, and I stay in a rent house with my friends. The canteen is very bad here. Many sports and games are played here, and the ground available to play games is huge.

reviews.review_heading: I think shriram ram group are the best college of Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Shri ram group of institution are provided very experienced faculty. Library is very good. Mostly book are available in library. Food facility is available in the college campus. Sports faculty are also good. Classroom are very good.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85 percent of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 20 LPA - 25 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Almost 50 percent of students got internships in national companies. Top recruiting companies are TCS etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers a range of facilities in both gaming and agriculture. It has good infrastructure WiFi access and several labs while the classrooms and library are of average quality. The hostel accommodations are pleasant and the food served is also good. The canteen provides a variety of tasty options. This college offers more sports and games compared to other colleges in Udaipur and the medical facilities are satisfactory.

review_summary.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 75% of the students got placed in our course. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary is 4 LPA. The hotels in our locality and many more companies and industries which are nearby our college. Many of the students get their internships from hotels and industries.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are available in our course like best classrooms, seminar hall, library, etc. The facility of hostel is also available at the college. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very hygienic and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. 10 LPA is the package offered. Zydus, Sun Pharma, and Scortis Pharma are the recruiting companies. 100% of students got internships in Zydus, Sun Pharma, and Scortis Pharma. In our college, most of the students like to go into quality control or production because it is the easiest job and it has the biggest role in the industry.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very good, and all chemicals are available in labs. Students can practice from there easily. Our hostel is very good, and the view from the hostel is very beautiful. The food in a hostel is just like homemade food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 85 percent of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 20 LPA - 25 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Almost 50 percent of students got internships in national companies. Top recruiting companies are TCS etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers a range of facilities in both gaming and agriculture. It has good infrastructure WiFi access and several labs while the classrooms and library are of average quality. The hostel accommodations are pleasant and the food served is also good. The canteen provides a variety of tasty options. This college offers more sports and games compared to other colleges in Udaipur and the medical facilities are satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In the end, the college was good and you will find some good friends here.

content.Placements: In my course, many students get their placements through college. This course has a wide range of opportunities in foreign countries. Most of the students did their internships at Ananta Hospital Medical Institute and other hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel that is located is not so good. The washrooms are very dirty and have very less facilities. The food is also not so good. The college library is good. Classrooms are well-arranged. There are a variety of sports facilities in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The last point is that my college provides good knowledge but not placements.

content.Placements: My college offers the highest package of Rs. 25,000 to the batch toppers. Placement in my college is very poor, it is not helpful for the students.
content.Infrastructure: My hostel's infrastructure is very poor, it is ridiculous, and there is no cleanliness. The food is tasteless, and issues like alcohol and drug consumption, daily fights of seniors, ragging, and much more are happening in my hostel. I will be leaving my hostel as soon as my one year is complete, because I have fulfilled my feeling of hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: Bhupal Nobles University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bhupal Nobles University offers UG, PG, Diploma and research programmes in the stream of Humanities & Social Science, Teaching & Education, Law, Medicine & Health Sciences, Arts, Accounting & Commerce, and Pharmacy. The University has multiple departments which are known as faculties offering 76 courses across 13 streams. BNU has over 30 experienced and highly qualified faculty members on its campus.

For Bhupal Nobles University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Bhupal Nobles University course admissions 2025:

Bhupal Nobles University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for Bhupal Nobles University admissions 2025:
Step 1: Bhupal Nobles University Application Process 2025

Bhupal Nobles University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Bhupal Nobles University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Bhupal Nobles University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main for the selection of respective courses. Furthermore, the university offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

They must pay the BSc course fee before on deadline and finalise their BSc seats at the BN University.

Bhupal Nobles' University BPharma fee is INR 2.8 lakh. The BPharma tuition fee includes a time fee payment of INR 1,500. Also, candidates might have to pay a registration fee of INR 1,000. Further, to finalize BPharma seats, candidates must pay the course fee before the due date and get the receipt from the office. Students are required to present the fee receipt to the subject teacher/s to get their names enlisted in the respective class Attendance Register of the Subject Teacher.

To avail the Bhupal Nobles University scholarships, candidates must officially get admitted to the university's course. The university offers scholarships are merit based.  Students must fulfill certain criteria to be eligible for the scholarships which are as follows:

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

individual_reviews.title: The college has good placement and all facilities are available.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed in our course. The average packages are offered. The top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, etc. 70% of students get an internship from our course in higher package companies, and the main roles are offered in this course.

The facilities in the university hostel are good, and the quality food is available in the mess and canteen. The medical facilities are available.
