faqs.question: How can MBA applicants get quick responses to their admission-related queries at MVN University?
faqs.answer: MBA Applicants are encouraged to use the MVN University Query Management System (MVN University-QMS) for faster responses. To use it, register and verify your email ID, then click on [Any Queries? Ask Us] in your dashboard. Choose the relevant query category and submit your question directly through the system.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MVN University BPharm admission?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BPharm programme is based on merit and performance in the university's entrance exam. Applicants must have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry, English, and either Mathematics or Biology. Students are shortlisted based on entrance test results and proceed to HSTES counselling for final selection.

faqs.question: What are the attendance requirements for BSc students at MVN University?
faqs.answer: BSc students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance in all subjects to be eligible for the semester examination at MVN University. In special cases, a shortfall of up to 5% may be condoned by the Dean or HOD on medical or compensatory grounds, allowing students with at least 70% attendance to appear for exams if approved by the Registrar. Those falling below 70% attendance risk being detained and will be required to repeat the semester or year in the next academic session, along with payment of applicable fees.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to the MVN University BA programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is an entrance exam conducted by the MVN University itself. BA aspirants will have to appear for the said exam to ensure the confirmation of their admission to the BA programme. To stay updated with the dates related to the entrance exam, students must often check the official university website for updates.

placement_report.college_name: MVN University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: MVN University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The official placement report for 2023 has not been released. However, the NIRF report is out on the official website. As per the report, 39 BPharma, 48 UG (3-year) and 6 PG (2-year) students were placed in 2022. The median package offered to BPharma students was INR 3.20 LPA . Further, the median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during MVN University placements 2022 was INR 2.80 LPA and INR 3.60 LPA , respectively.

tables.context: How are the placements at MVN University?

faqs.question: How are the placements at MVN University?
faqs.answer: The placement report or brochure for the 2022 drive has not been released. As per the data sourced from the NIRF report 2023, 39 out of 60 BPharma students were placed in 2022. Further, 48 UG (3-year) and 6 PG (2-year) students were placed. Check the complete insights of MVN University placements 2022 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Total students (BPharma) 60 Students placed (BPharma) 39 Median package (BPharma) INR 3.20 LPA Total students (UG-3 year) 94 Students placed (UG-3 year) 48 Median package (UG-3 year) INR 2.80 LPA Total students (PG-2 year) 9 Students placed (PG-2 year) 6 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 3.60 LPA NOTE: The above statistics are gathered from the NIRF report 2023.

faqs.question: What bank job profiles are available after completing B.Sc Agriculture in India?

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placement and all facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in this course and department are good. Wi-Fi is available, and there are 3 ACs in one lab. The classroom is in clean condition. The facilities in the university hostel are good, and the quality food is available in the mess and canteen. The medical facilities are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Engineering and Technology, MVN UniversityReviewed on 19 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My university is basically for students having rich background as fee structure is high.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is good. There is cleaning in rooms. Wi-Fi is available as well. Proper labs are for every subject. Mechanical workshop, physics practical labs, computer labs, hardware labs, etc., are there. The library is good and we got a library card. You can take books for a certain period of time and after that you can reissue them.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college life at mvn.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was great. Wi-Fi enabled campuses. Laboratory, air-conditioned classrooms, and library there. The hostel was neat with good food. Medical facilities were also provided. With coach and gym, equipment for sports and games is also there.

reviews.review_heading: You can opt for this college only if it's in your hometown or near your location.

college_info.college_name: MVN University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: MVN University provides sports scholarships for various achievements. For Olympic medalists, the tuition fee is fully waived. Other categories like Asian Games, Commonwealth Games, and World Cup offer 50%-100% fee waivers, with varying percentages based on event level and participation. Local school/district participants receive a 10% fee waiver.

MBA in Real Estate Management at MVN University has a structured fee system. The tuition fee is INR 75,000, with an additional INR 17,000 for other charges. From the first year onwards, the fee increases to INR 92,000. This cost covers the core learning and additional resources for the students.

MVN University provides merit-based scholarships to BCom students as a way to reward academic excellence. Students achieving 95% or higher can receive a 50% tuition fee waiver, while those scoring between 90%-94.9% are eligible for a 40% reduction. The scholarship scale continues with fee reductions for students scoring 75%-89.9% (30%),  65%-74.9% (20%), and 50%-64.9% (10%), ensuring that students at different performance levels are supported.

Yes, MVN University offers sports scholarships to MBA students based on their achievements. Students can receive up to 100% tuition fee waiver for Olympic medal winners,  75% for Asian Games/Championship, and 50% for Commonwealth and World Cup winners. The scholarship is also available for National, State, and School/College/District-level participants.

Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categorie

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Varuvan vadivelan institute of technology is absolutely a good college.

content.Placements: Varuvan Vadivelan Institute of Technology is the most famous college in Dharmapuri district. In 2021, above 95 percent of my batch students will be placed in good companies like IBM, HCL, TVS, TCS, etc. So this college placement was very good. The highest salary package is 9 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 1.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Varuvan Vadivelan Institute of Technology is located in a very beautiful and eco-friendly place. More departments, equipped laboratories, and a library are available for this college. The food in this college hostel is very hygienic. Sports ground facilities are also available for this college.

content.Infrastructure: In our college, hostel facility is available. The good food is available. Many more sports and games like kabaddi and cricket are available. All the engineering courses are available in our college. Students can choose this college for the best studying places.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

review_summary.college_name: Amruta Vaishnavi Education & Welfare Trust Shatabdi Institute of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amruta Vaishnavi Education & Welfare Trust Shatabdi Institute of Engineering.

content.Placements: Placements were very good initially. From a batch of 200 students, about 20 students got placed from the mechanical stream. Top recruiters for our course were Mahindra Sona, Involute Gears Pvt Ltd, Ring Gear Aqua Plus and Osmosis Reverse Pvt Ltd. Generally, around 20%-25% of the students get placed every year from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is available here, and students from every place of India join our college every year. Our college is situated underneath, so there is a good natural scene of Agaskhind. There is a medical facility for an emergency. There is a canteen, and inside the canteen, mess facility is also available. Indoor games can be played, and there is also a cricket stadium.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Institute where I got Graduate.

content.Placements: Our institute provided the best placement service to us because of 90% of students get placed in our batch. It provided an average of the highest salary 12lakh PA and the lowest upto 3.5lakh annually. There are much more recruiting companies like HAL, HUL, Syska, suzlon.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good as others. There are better labs, classroom and library available and the quality also too good of it. All ammunities available in hostels and college. The quality of foods and beverages are also good which was provided by our canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college needs to have more permanent and experienced staff.

content.Placements: 5 to 10% of the students are placed. Most of the students are from rural areas so most of them join farming after completing course also. 10k was the highest salary. No one got any internship.
content.Infrastructure: 1. It has labs, library, classrooms, seminar room. But no facility of Wi-Fi, computer facility was not there, no water facility was there no canteen facility, no sports activities. 2. The hostel was well developed. But I don't know about the food as I was not a hostel student But canteen facility is the worst there. No sports room.
content.Faculty: 1. Teaching staff changed on a monthly basis. Due to internal problems of college. No experience staff was there. 2. The course curriculum was relevant. But it does not make students industry-ready, I think practical knowledge should be more than theoretical knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Scholarships are provided by the college for the economically backward students.

review_content.Placements: Last year, all the students got placed in different companies with a basic salary of INR 20,000 per month. The highest package is around INR 10–12 lacs per annum. Companies like TCS, TATA Consultancy, etc. visit here. Telecommunication supervisors, product managers, assistant engineers, etc. are the roles offered for ECE students.
review_content.Infrastructure: A large collection of references and textbooks is provided by the college. Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and labs are there. Good-quality food is provided by the canteen at a budget-friendly rate. Wi-Fi-enabled hostel facilities are there. Indoor games are provided for the hostelers.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college but dissatisfied because of the fees.

review_content.Placements: The average package of the course is INR 3 to 4 Lacs. Placements are provided in the college every year. Placement training is also provided. Most of the students who cleared all the papers can get placements in the campus placement. Students can also get placement training at a low budget.
review_content.Infrastructure: Vidya academy provides good facilities and infrastructure in the college. Every branch has special labs, lab faculty, good classrooms and advanced classrooms that included projectors. They also provided a library in the college. Students get a library access for an hour every week.

individual_reviews.title: College is very amazing, and more opportunities are provided.

Good-quality food is provided by the canteen at a budget-friendly rate. Wi-Fi-enabled hostel facilities are there. Indoor games are provided for the hostelers.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college but dissatisfied because of the fees.

content.Placements: The average package of the course is INR 3 to 4 Lacs. Placements are provided in the college every year. Placement training is also provided. Most of the students who cleared all the papers can get placements in the campus placement. Students can also get placement training at a low budget.
content.Infrastructure: Vidya academy provides good facilities and infrastructure in the college. Every branch has special labs, lab faculty, good classrooms and advanced classrooms that included projectors. They also provided a library in the college. Students get a library access for an hour every week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall a good college for study perspective. Placement and other activities need improvement.

content.Placements: Placement in this college needs improvement. The college isn't directly tied up to any MNC or reputed company for placements. The students gets placed through off campus recruitment conducted by MNCs like tcs, infosys, tech mahindra. The company which has tie up with the college offers very low package 2-2.4lpa. Proper placement classes aren't provided from the start to help the student be ready for placement. But the teachers are helpful in clarifying doubts pertaining to concepts. Few got internship and around 30% got placed in company.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure is above average and is good. Labs, classrooms, library are properly groomed. Hostel infrastructure is good but the rules for girls are stricter than boys which isn't fair. The food quality is not upto the mark. Medical facilities is minimum. Sports and games are given the least importance in this college.

reviews.review_heading: College is very amazing, and more opportunities are provided.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is very beautiful in terms of rooms, bathrooms, and hostel facilities. The hostel fee is very low, with food and accommodation available. Food is normal and tastes very good. The canteen is fully clean at all times. The canteen owner is fully secure in the canteen place and food is very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. We have very clean surroundings. Wi-Fi is not allowed for students in classrooms. It is available in the library. The library has books which we need to have in our academics. It can boost our reading skills and love towards reading. Classrooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Scholarships are provided by the college for the economically backward students.
reviews.review_text: A large collection of references and textbooks is provided by the college. Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and labs are there. Good-quality food is provided by the canteen at a budget-friendly rate. Wi-Fi-enabled hostel facilities are there. Indoor games are provided for the hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college but dissatisfied because of the fees.
reviews.review_text: Vidya academy provides good facilities and infrastructure in the college. Every branch has special labs, lab faculty, good classrooms and advanced classrooms that included projectors. They also provided a library in the college. Students get a library access for an hour every week.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college for study perspective. Placement and other activities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure is above average and is good. Labs, classrooms, library are properly groomed. Hostel infrastructure is good but the rules for girls are stricter than boys which isn't fair. The food quality is not upto the mark. Medical facilities is minimum. Sports and games are given the least importance in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Vidya academy of Science and technology technical campus.
reviews.review_text: Neat and clean hostel and canteen. Moderately good food. Canteen and hostel are not that big but a good one. Sports and games are conducted and those who have talents are trained. Good lab facilities. A large library with lots of books.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely it is a very good college with great teaching teachers and high result percentage.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure, along with great labs and workshops. Classrooms are well maintained with enough electricity. Every day after college timing, classrooms and corridors are cleaned and disposed of. Toilets are well cleaned and maintained, and enough water facility is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, all good, come and enjoy.
reviews.review_text:
Civil engineering is a very good course to me. 
Classrooms are smart and more study materials are provided by the teachers. 
And also refer library books for references.
Library are of much more books, browsing facilities are also there in the library. 
Hostels facilities are good, different for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Trips before joining vidya academy of Science and technology technical campus kilimanoor.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good the college provided with great facilities like 4 computer labs and two labs for our departmentand. I was not using the hostel facilities but I got friends that use college hostel the rooms and the ambience was also good but the food sometimes get bad.

reviews.review_heading: The famous Vidya academy of science and technology
reviews.review_text:
WiFi library and classrooms. High tech lab facilities and well maintained hostel and mess all the students are happy to be a part of our vidya family 
Especially the food served in the mess is finger licking good and doesn?t compromise in quality they are very cautious regarding hygiene

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities in the classroom are great. All the classrooms and library are well-equipped with modern facilities. There are computer systems for internet browsing.
Wi-Fi is available for both students and teachers. 
Medical facilities are there and a doctor is also available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm also dissatisfied with our faculty members. The infrastructure of the college is minimal.
reviews.review_text: Lab classrooms are highly equipped. The Wi-Fi connection is poor. The library is high-tech, and almost all books are available. The hostel and canteen food are good. Sports and game sets are provided every year, which encourages students in sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is really good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Classrooms are spacious. The library is also good. Facilities in the canteen are also good. The college also provides medical facilities. Facilities to play games and for sports are also available after 4:00 pm, which means after the class hours.

highlights.summary: NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur is an institute. It is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur provides UG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across specialisation such as Computer Science Engineering. Some of the course offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur fees is INR 8,00,000. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur offers these course across fields such as Engineering. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur offers all the campus facilities to students.

placements.overview: NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur is an institute. It is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur provides UG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across specialisation such as Computer Science Engineering. Some of the course offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur fees is INR 8,00,000. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur offers these course across fields such as Engineering. NxtWave Institute Of Advanced Technologies, Jaipur offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: In my perspective, NIAT gives you the learning required in todays market.

review_content.Placements: First of all this is my first semester and also NXT WAVE also start this year in VGU university Jaipur so there is no placement records yet in this campus but can be seen in Next semester in internship because curriculum of NIAT is really very good they teach you languages python, web development in first semester and also helps in improving your other skills like communications.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of classes is very nice, with Wi-Fi of good speed, AC classrooms, smart board, and curtains in the classes so overall classes are nice but the hostel has some problems as it belongs to VGU so it has some food issues and sometimes weak Wi-Fi issues also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: A good college but not good campus life.

review_content.Placements: This is the 1st batch of my college so I do not know about placement. But according to their syllabus, I think it gives us good placement. I think students get a minimum of around 20 to 30 LPA packages. The syllabus is good, not outdated.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good but hostels are so costly. Our college is good, but the hostels are not good. According to price, the hostel rooms are good, but the mess food is very bad. The hostel and the mess are not good, according to the price these are too costly, and I wish they would understand our problem.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The curriculum is really good, but the infrastructure and extracurricular activities are average.

review_content.Placements: This is the first batch of Nxtwave Institute of Advanced Technology, so there is no history of placement rates yet. However, they claim 3000+ companies to help students get placed. Based on the first semester syllabus, I think we are getting a good start for the upcoming placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The college provides smart classrooms and reliable Wi-Fi, though there is only one lab with limited equipment. The hostel is very expensive and has minimal facilities. The mess food is very bad, making mealtime a struggle. Overall, it is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good young faculty and decent infrastructure. Placement details are not available.

review_content.Placements: As this is the first batch of Nxtwave Institute of Technology in VGU Jaipur. There is no history of placement rates yet. However, they claim that they have built alliances with 3000+ companies to help students get placed. It includes companies like Google, Microsoft, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Nxt wave Institute of Technology, Jaipur, is good. The classrooms have curtains, AC, and LED screens. The entire syllabus is well covered using laptops. The VGU hostels are good and provide all facilities that students need.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good but located far from Jaipur, with overall decent facilities.

review_content.Placements: This is the first batch of NIAT (Nxtwave Institute of Advanced Technologies). So there is no official record of placement history yet. However, they claim that they have connections with more than 3000 companies to help students get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The college provides smart classrooms and reliable Wi-Fi, though there is only a single lab. The hostel is very expensive compared to facilities provided to students. The hostel premises are good, but the mess is very crowded, and the food is not as good as expected given the hostel fees.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in curriculum and other activities and the teachers are also good.

review_content.Placements: There is first batch in Nxtwave Institute of Advanced Technology Jaipur. This is the first batch, so there is no record of placement, but they say they have collaboration with 3000 companies and, according to them, the curriculum is new; it is designed according to company needs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, small but good. Hostel is also good, but the fees of hostel are also very high. According to the quality of hostel and mess, the food quality is very bad, but our classroom infrastructure is good quality classroom.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are no proper placements in our college, but our seniors are placed through off-campus services. individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a waste college, a waste of money, with poor faculty and no proper classes conducted.

content.Placements: No placements are offered, they only put some company names on their posters, but no campus interviews are conducted because the college is located beside a village, not in the city. No internships are there or provided to the students, and if we find our own, they will not support us.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel has no Wi-Fi, and in one room, there are 10 to 20 students, the water tank is full of grime, and the food is bad, with non-vegetarian meals served only once a week. The labs have no working hardware equipment, and many computers don’t boot and are outdated, with no proper maintenance. In the classrooms, switchboards, fans, and lights don’t function, they are only for show, not for use.

description: Bomma Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Bomma Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 45429 and 126907 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialis

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 45429, 99388 and 99746, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Bomma Institute of Technology and Science. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Bomma Institute of Technology and Science MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 44052. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 39648, and the 2023 cutoff was 47235 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs and good classrooms. Wi-Fi facility is in control of the staff members, and the hostel is also provided. Good food is served in the canteen. reviews.review_text: Our college provides most of the facilities but not all. However, they are useful, but we miss more informative books which are available in the library. reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of college .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connections are very fast, and we have all the experiments instruments in our labs. The library has all branches of books at our college. Sports games are held every two days in our college, like cricket, basketball, and volleyball during the week. The faculty is very supportive of the students and friends, making it easy to live joyfully in college days. The subjects of the course are electronics, communication and engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Really the college has good infrastructure but no placement.
reviews.review_text: In the college, there were labs for all the subjects that have to be done practically, but no one was made to do practicals. Coming to hostel rooms, they are a mess. No proper bathrooms, and students were not taken care of properly. The management was not having a proper response.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure available for our course. There is no Wi-Fi available. The labs, classrooms, and library are good. The hostel has no facilities, and they provided bad food and ugly washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the management.
reviews.review_text:
We have every lab related to the courses. Our classrooms are good. We have a peaceful library. We don't have any good facilities in our hostel and canteen. 
We don't have medical facilities. Our college conducts sports and games occasionally.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are not very good. The food quality in neatness is not good, and medical facilities are not there sports and games. students can play but the canteen is not good. The food nobody has decency and respect about students and their parents so do not join this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college or campus in good looking. The Wi-Fi facilty is only for faculty. But when it comes to the topic of hostels, infrastructure is very poor in condition. The food facility is very poor. Most of the students opt pain guest accommodation from the city or they travel to college from their home.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are waste as there is a lack of instruments, and most of the instruments are damaged. There is no electricity in labs, no furniture like benches, etc. Classrooms are good, and all the books are available in the library. There is a hostel on our campus, but it is waste as furniture is not available. The floor is also damaged, and the mess food is waste.

reviews.review_heading: I have enjoyed a mediocre college life with very mediocre results.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs were awesome in our college, and 24x7 internet connection is available. A lot of sports activities are conducted regularly. Hostel facilities are very good, and food is also nice to eat. Canteen food is very good, and they perform inspection regularly to maintain quality.

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: C Byregowda Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College, coaching, infrastructure - Absolutely gorgeous. Placements - average.

content.Placements: The placement compared to other colleges is poor, and the companies coming are only startup companies, and the salary is also minimal. I mean, the package is low. My suggestion is to improve placements. After improvement in placements, the college can become one of the top 10 in Karnataka.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and the college has 25 acres of land, a good environment, good playgrounds, and other activities. The hostel also provides good food, good rooms, and maintains cleanliness well.
content.Faculty: Yes, the faculty is also very good in teaching and caring. Their teaching level is excellent, and the exams are also well-organized. The college is under Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology, and the courses are very good, with subjects covered semester by semester in Computer Science and Engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities are there in our college.

content.Placements: Our college is best for placements. Compared to other colleges in Karnataka, our college has a good number of placements. About 70 percent of students get placed. The highest package is INR 30 lacs per annum. The lowest package is INR 3 lacs per annum. The average package is INR 4 lacs per year. HCL and Wipro are major recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available at the college. Every student can access the WiFi. The classrooms and labs are well maintained. They have good infrastructure. Medical facilities are also available at the college. The ground is available. The hostel facility is available to both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not bad enough to degrade this college.

content.Placements: There is no enough campus placement in our college. It is very low here. More than 50% of the students will no place during placements. Very few members will get jobs during placements. The top pacakge is 800000 per annum. But our college is trying to tie with some more companies to increase placements.
content.Infrastructure: Coming to the our course. The course is good and we are getting facilities good but. In labs some computers will not work properly then there we face shortage of computers issue. And coming to the hostel college have the hostel but no one from our college will stay there. But other college students are there in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty, infrastructure and placement.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of seats will be filled every year through K-CET. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA and the highest package is 5.6LPA. Wipro, Infosys, TCS google, etc. are the top recruiters. Almost 100% students got internship from our college in BEMEL, GTTC, HTML, DECCAN, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Labs are well-equipped and facilities are good in all the other aspects like canteen, medical facilities, sports, extracurricular activities, etc. Library is one of the most amazing things here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college surroundings and lectures, but dissatisfied with placements.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is very low, about 35%. The lowest package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the highest package is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Tata etc. About 65% of students got internships. I don't know about the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not much bad. Hostels don't have Wi-Fi. The library is maintained properly, which is a good thing. The canteen food is good. The hostel food is also good. There are no medical facilities, and no sports are conducted.
